prompt: Create a clean studio portrait expression sheet of a young Black man shown in exactly 6 separate head-and-shoulders portraits arranged in a 3-column by 2-row grid. The man has short cropped black hair, warm brown skin, a neatly trimmed short beard and mustache, and distinctive thick translucent white eyeglasses. He wears a dark charcoal or black blazer over a crisp white open-collar dress shirt in every panel. Use a neutral beige-gray studio backdrop, soft even portrait lighting, realistic photography, sharp facial detail, and consistent camera angle and framing across all six images. The six expressions must be: top left, broad friendly smile showing teeth; top center, calm neutral serious face looking straight at camera; top right, surprised delighted face with wide eyes and open mouth; bottom left, joyful laughing smile with eyes slightly squinted; bottom center, thoughtful skeptical pose with furrowed brow and one hand touching the chin; bottom right, subtle smirk looking off to the side. Keep the portraits tightly cropped from chest to head, evenly spaced with clean horizontal and vertical grid alignment, no text, no logos, no extra people, no props except the glasses and the hand in the thoughtful pose. Style should feel like a polished professional actor headshot contact sheet for social media reaction expressions.

promptZh: 创建一张清晰的摄影棚肖像表情表，展示 一位年轻黑人男性，要求包含 6 张独立的半身肖像，并排列成 3 列 2 行的网格。该男子留着黑色短发，拥有温暖的棕色皮肤、修剪整齐的短胡须，并佩戴着独特的厚边透明白框眼镜。在每一张图中，他都穿着深炭灰色或黑色西装外套，内搭清爽的白色开领衬衫。使用中性米灰色摄影棚背景，采用柔和均匀的肖像布光，呈现写实摄影风格，面部细节清晰，且六张图像的拍摄角度和构图保持一致。六种表情分别为：左上，露出牙齿的开朗友好微笑；中上，直视镜头的冷静中性严肃表情；右上，睁大眼睛、张开嘴巴的惊喜表情；左下，眯起双眼、愉悦大笑的表情；中下，眉头微皱、单手托腮的沉思怀疑表情；右下，看向侧面的微妙坏笑。肖像需紧凑裁剪至胸部以上，间距均匀，横纵网格对齐整齐，无文字，无 Logo，无多余人物，除眼镜和沉思姿势中的手部外，不包含任何道具。整体风格应呈现为专业演员的头像联络表，用于 社交媒体反应表情。
